```{python}
#Imports 
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

'''
Capture_1 - Mostly video streaming(e.g. Netflix)
Capture_2 - YouTube and Spotify
Capture_3 - YouTube
'''

df = pd.read_csv("data/wifi_dataset_2.csv", index_col=False)

# calcualte % of AP->Device and Device->AP
df_data = df[df["wlan.fc.type"] == 2.0]

ap_device = df_data[df_data["wlan.bssid"] == df_data["wlan.ta"]]

device_ap = df_data[df_data["wlan.bssid"] == df_data["wlan.ra"]]

total: int = df_data.shape[0]
ap_device_cnt: int = ap_device.shape[0]
device_ap_cnt: int = device_ap.shape[0]

print(ap_device_cnt / total * 100)
print(device_ap_cnt / total * 100)

# Display statistics of frames 

types = df["wlan.fc.type"].value_counts(normalize=True)

types.plot(kind="bar", stacked=True)

subtypes = df["wlan.fc.subtype"].value_counts(normalize=True)

subtypes.plot(kind="bar", stacked=True)

plt.show()


# Information on QoS parameters

```
